title: Analytics - Fit Test Opened
scenario: Fit Test screen opening logs an event with Device PID, with event counts updating after a few hours on the Firebase dashboard.
steps: Wait for event counts to update (a few hours).
expected: The Firebase dashboard displays default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, App Environment) plus Device PID.
